title: The A2 Gauntlet
description: A mixed elementary-level challenge that blends the whole A2 band — past simple, present continuous, the future, comparatives and superlatives, and quantifiers — across the grammar, vocabulary, reading and spelling strands, climbing from a gentle warm-up to a final elite trial.
sources: CEFR A2 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Raymond Murphy, Essential Grammar in Use (past simple, present continuous, future forms, comparison, quantifiers)
